variables.subject: Re: Project Update: Q2 Roadmap and Final Deliverables
variables.body:
Hi Osman,
I hope your week is off to a productive start.
I’m writing to provide a quick update on our progress for the Q2 Roadmap. After our review session yesterday, we have successfully finalized the design phase and are moving into the implementation stage.
Please take note of the following upcoming milestones:
Draft Review: Friday, April 10th
Stakeholder Presentation: Tuesday, April 14th
Final Handover: Thursday, April 16th
I’ve attached the revised timeline for your reference. If you notice any potential bottlenecks or if your current bandwidth doesn’t allow for these deadlines, please let me know by EOD tomorrow so we can adjust accordingly.
Thanks for the hard work, everyone.
Best regards,
Sophia

[2026-04-01] Osman Yousufzia: Hi Sophia,

Thank you for the update on the Q2 Roadmap. I'm pleased to hear that we’ve finalized the design phase and are now moving into implementation. 

I’ll review the upcoming milestones and the attached timeline. If I identify any potential issues with the deadlines, I’ll ensure to reach out by the end of the day tomorrow.

Thanks for your support and for keeping us aligned.

Best regards, 
Osman
